mapper.select: SELECT id , username , name , email , role , created_at , updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id , username , name , email , role , created_at , updated_at FROM users ORDER BY id
SELECT id , username , name , email , password , role , created_at , updated_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id , username , name , email , password , role , created_at , updated_at FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
